시편 97:1.content: Yahweh reigns! Let the earth rejoice! Let the multitude of islands be glad!

시편 97:2.content: Clouds and darkness are around him. Righteousness and justice are the foundation of his throne.

시편 97:3.content: A fire goes before him, and burns up his adversaries on every side.

시편 97:4.content: His lightning lights up the world. The earth sees, and trembles.

시편 97:5.content: The mountains melt like wax at the presence of Yahweh, at the presence of the Lord of the whole earth.

시편 97:6.content: The heavens declare his righteousness. All the peoples have seen his glory.

시편 97:7.content: Let all them be shamed who serve engraved images, who boast in their idols. Worship him, all you gods!

시편 97:8.content: Zion heard and was glad. The daughters of Judah rejoiced because of your judgments, Yahweh.

시편 97:9.content: For you, Yahweh, are most high above all the earth. You are exalted far above all gods.

시편 97:10.content: You who love Yahweh, hate evil! He preserves the souls of his saints. He delivers them out of the hand of the wicked.

시편 97:11.content: Light is sown for the righteous, and gladness for the upright in heart.

시편 97:12.content: Be glad in Yahweh, you righteous people! Give thanks to his holy Name.
